points.text: Get vaccinated to reduce the spread and severity of COVID-19.
Practice good personal hygiene, including regular hand washing and covering coughs and sneezes.
Maintain physical distancing and avoid close contact with infected individuals.
Ensure proper ventilation in indoor spaces to reduce virus transmission.
Stay home if diagnosed with COVID-19 or if you suspect infection, and follow self-isolation guidelines.
Stay home if you feel ill or have COVID-19 symptoms to prevent spreading the virus.
Maintain good indoor airflow and practice physical distancing to reduce virus transmission.
Wear a mask in appropriate settings to protect yourself and others from COVID-19.
Wash hands frequently with soap for at least 20 seconds or use hand sanitizer with at least 60% alcohol.
Cover coughs and sneezes with a tissue or your elbow, then wash your hands.
Avoid crowded places and maintain physical distance of at least 1 metre from others.
Wear a mask in public where community transmission is present and physical distancing isn't possible.
Wash hands frequently with soap and water or alcohol-based hand rub.
Ensure good ventilation in indoor spaces to reduce virus spread.
Get vaccinated to help reduce the spread of the virus and its mutations.
